description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and sets the POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables for the test database. Add a global before_script that copies config/database-ci.yml to config/database.yml, prints the Ruby version and its location, installs bundler without documentation, runs bundle check or bundle install, and creates and migrates the test database with RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rake db:create and db:migrate. Define an rspec job in the default test stage that executes bundle exec rspec. Do not configure any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
